---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're facing. What are you trying to do that is currently not possible or awkward?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like. Include any API design ideas (new props, ref methods, etc.) if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you prefer your proposed solution?

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or any other context that helps illustrate the request.
